mapper.select: /* selectVehicky */ SELECT ${userData.commonSchema}.FN_MD_VEHICKY() AS VOWNKEY FROM DUAL

/* selectMvhcmaSelectBox */ SELECT VEHICKY AS combovl, VHCFNAM AS combonm FROM ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MV WHERE MV.VHUSEYN = 'Y'
AND (MV.PUBLCYN = 'Y' OR (MV.PUBLCYN = 'N' AND MV.DMWPLNM = #{params.dmwplnm}))
AND (MV.PUBLCYN = 'Y' OR (MV.PUBLCYN = 'N' AND MV.DMWPLNM = REPLACE(LOWER(#{userData.schema}), '_', '-')))
AND MV.VOWNKEY LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{params.vownkey}), '%')
GROUP BY MV.VHCSNAM, MV.VEHICKY ORDER BY MV.VHCSNAM, MV.VEHICKY

/* selectOneMvhcma */ SELECT MVH.VOWNKEY, MVH.VEHICKY, MVH.VHCFNAM, MVH.VHCTYPE, MVH.VHCTNCD, MVH.VHCOPTY, MVH.DRVERNM, MVH.DRVERPH, MVH.POSCOYN, MVH.VHCVRYN, MVH.VHUSEYN, MVO.VONAMLC, MVH.UPDTCHK, MVO.UPDTCHK AS VOUDTCK FROM ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MVH INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVOWMA MVO ON MVH.VOWNKEY = MVO.VOWNKEY WHERE MVH.VHCFNAM = #{param.vhcfnam}

/* selectRegistrationRelationList */ SELECT MDE.REGIKEY, MDE.CUSTKEY, MRE.RENAMLC FROM ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MDE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MCU ON(MCU.CUSTKEY = MDE.CUSTKEY) INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRE ON(MRE.REGIKEY = MDE.REGIKEY) WHERE MCU.CUDELYN = 'Y' AND MRE.REUSEYN = 'Y' AND MDE.DEUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY MDE.REGIKEY, MDE.CUSTKEY, MRE.RENAMLC

/* selectMdesmaList */ SELECT CONCAT(MD.REGIKEY, MD.CUSTKEY, MD.DESTKEY) AS ROWKEY , MD.REGIKEY, MR.RENAMLC AS RENAMLC, MD.CUSTKEY, MC.CUNAMLC AS CUNAMLC , MD.DESTKEY, MD.DENAMLC, MD.DENAMKO, MD.DENAMEN, MD.DEMANNM , MD.DEPOSBX, MD.DEPOSCD, MD.DESADDR, MD.DESTELN, MD.DESMEMO , MD.UNAVAT1, MD.UNAVAT2, MD.UNAVAT3, MD.DEUSEYN, MD.UPDTCHK, MR.REUSEYN , DATE_FORMAT(MD.CREDATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(MD.CRETIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(MD.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(MD.LMODATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(MD.LMOTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(MD.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER FROM ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MD INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MD.REGIKEY = MR.REGIKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MC ON MD.CUSTKEY = MC.CUSTKEY
AND MD.REGIKEY LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{params.regikey}), '%')
AND UPPER(MR.RENAMLC) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{params.renamlc}), '%')
AND MD.CUSTKEY LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{params.custkey}), '%')
AND UPPER(MC.CUNAMLC) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{params.cunamlc}), '%')
AND MD.DESTKEY LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{params.destkey}), '%')
AND UPPER(MD.DENAMLC) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{params.denamlc}), '%')
AND MD.DEUSEYN = #{params.deuseyn}
ORDER BY MC.CUNAMLC, MR.RENAMLC, MD.DENAMLC

/* selectDestinationRelationList */ SELECT CONCAT(MDE.CUSTKEY,'-',MDE.DESTKEY,'-',MDE.REGIKEY) AS CDRCODE , MDE.CUSTKEY AS OWNERKY , MDE.REGIKEY, MDE.DESTKEY , MDE.DENAMLC, MCU.CUNAMLC, MRE.RENAMLC , MDE.DEMANNM, MDE.DEPOSCD, MDE.DESADDR, MDE.DESTELN FROM ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MDE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MCU ON(MCU.CUSTKEY = MDE.CUSTKEY) INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRE ON(MRE.REGIKEY = MDE.REGIKEY) WHERE MCU.CUDELYN = 'Y' AND MRE.REUSEYN = 'Y' AND MDE.DEUSEYN = 'Y'
